children.heading: Procedures for issuance of reports
children.label: a Procedures for issuance of reports
children.text: The Statistics Commissioner, shall establish procedures, in accordance with , to ensure that the reports issued under this section are relevant, of high quality, useful to customers, subject to rigorous peer review, produced in a timely fashion, and free from any partisan political influence.1section 9576 of this titleSo in original. The comma probably should not appear.1

children.heading: Report on condition and progress of education
children.label: b Report on condition and progress of education
children.text: Not later than , and each June 1 thereafter, the Statistics Commissioner, shall submit to the President and the appropriate congressional committees a statistical report on the condition and progress of education in the United States.June 1, 20031

children.heading: Statistical reports
children.label: c Statistical reports
children.text: The Statistics Commissioner shall issue regular and, as necessary, special statistical reports on education topics, particularly in the core academic areas of reading, mathematics, and science, consistent with the priorities and the mission of the Statistics Center.
